name: Dining Space
architecturalUse: Indicates dining space layouts, seating groups, and food service zones.

name: Office Workspace
architecturalUse: Marks dedicated workspace, offices, administrative areas, or business functions.

name: Classroom
architecturalUse: Marks educational spaces, classrooms, lecture halls, or seminar rooms.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing civic (Landmark) and school (School) symbols.

name: Studio
architecturalUse: Marks creative studios, design labs, digital workspaces, or control booths.

name: Workshop
architecturalUse: Indicates fabrication labs, maker spaces, woodshops, or manual work zones.

name: Retail Store
architecturalUse: Marks shopping areas, commercial retail spaces, storefronts, or markets.

name: Lobby
architecturalUse: Indicates building entrance lobbies, waiting areas, or front desks.

name: Reception Desk
architecturalUse: Marks service counters, check-in points, or administrative desks.

name: Storage Room
architecturalUse: Indicates closets, stockrooms, archive spaces, or general storage facilities.

name: Utility Room
architecturalUse: Marks laundry rooms, back-of-house service, janitorial closets, or plant support.

name: Single Bedroom
architecturalUse: Differentiates single occupancy rooms, dormitories, or guest bedrooms.

name: Toilet / WC
architecturalUse: Indicates water closets, public toilets, or compact washrooms.

name: Meeting Room
architecturalUse: Marks conference rooms, collaborative hubs, boardrooms, or team tables.

name: Cafe
architecturalUse: Marks office breakrooms, coffee bars, public cafes, or lounges.

name: Closed Door
architecturalUse: Indicates emergency exits, locked rooms, or restricted access doors.

name: Direction Down
architecturalUse: Indicates downward circulation, down stairs, or egress descent.

name: Direction Left
architecturalUse: Indicates leftward circulation direction or emergency egress route.

name: Direction Up Right
architecturalUse: Indicates diagonal ascent, ramps, stairs, or escalators in plan.

name: Direction Down Right
architecturalUse: Indicates diagonal descent, access ramps, or escape slopes in plan.

name: Vertical Ascent
architecturalUse: Marks rapid vertical transition points like elevators, lift shafts, or express stairs.

name: Vertical Descent
architecturalUse: Marks rapid vertical egress points, elevator drops, or chute exits.

name: Movement Hub
architecturalUse: Indicates circulation nodes, corridors crossings, or major vertical/horizontal distribution halls.
similarityWarning: Similar to Target (Crosshair) and Movement Arrow (MoveRight) symbols.

name: Table Layout
architecturalUse: Indicates structural table elements, workstations, or dining arrangements.

name: Desk Workstation
architecturalUse: Marks hot-desks, personal laptop space, study carrels, or office desking.
similarityWarning: Similar to studio (Monitor) and workstation (Computer) symbols.

name: Wardrobe / Storage Clos
architecturalUse: Marks lockers, wardrobes, custom joinery, or built-in closets.

name: Shower
architecturalUse: Indicates shower stalls, locker room facilities, or wet area layouts.
similarityWarning: Similar to bathroom (Bath) and toilet (Toilet) symbols.

name: Appliance: Microwave
architecturalUse: Marks kitchenette counter appliances or office pantry equipment.

name: Appliance: Fridge
architecturalUse: Indicates commercial or domestic refrigerator nodes in kitchen designs.

name: TV / Display Panel
architecturalUse: Indicates wall-mounted TV screens, presentation displays in meeting rooms, or monitors.

name: Computer Workstation
architecturalUse: Marks CAD stations, dedicated desktop workstations, or IT labs.
similarityWarning: Similar to desk (Laptop) and studio (Monitor) symbols.

name: Garden
architecturalUse: Marks decorative garden beds, flower planting, or sensory courtyards.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing landscape flower (Flower2) symbol.

name: Deciduous Tree
architecturalUse: Indicates deciduous (broadleaf) trees on site plans for seasonal sun analysis.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing pine tree (TreePine) and forest (Trees) symbols.

name: Palm Tree
architecturalUse: Indicates palm trees in warm or coastal climate landscape layouts.

name: Outdoor Shelter
architecturalUse: Indicates temporary structures, event tents, or campsite locations.

name: Water Waves
architecturalUse: Indicates larger open water bodies, rivers, coastal zones, or major water movement.

name: Fire Extinguisher
architecturalUse: Indicates locations of wall-mounted fire extinguishers or fire cabinets.

name: Smoke Alarm / Sensor
architecturalUse: Marks ceiling-mounted smoke detectors or fire alarm system nodes.

name: Waste Receptacle
architecturalUse: Marks garbage collections, waste rooms, or trash bins in public areas.

name: Recycling Node
architecturalUse: Marks sorting bins, recycling cabinets, or ecological waste collection spaces.

name: Access Restricted (Lock)
architecturalUse: Marks rooms requiring card key access, mechanical keys, or high-security vaults.

name: Access Granted (Unlock)
architecturalUse: Marks public doors, override bypasses, or egress routes that unlock during emergency.

name: Audible Alarm / Bell
architecturalUse: Indicates warning bells, intercom chimes, or audio alert speakers.

name: Active Alarm Bell
architecturalUse: Marks active sirens, school bells, or sounders that ring continuously.

name: Hazard Indicator
architecturalUse: Marks high-voltage zones, steps, low ceilings, or dangerous machinery zones.

name: Dashboard Gauge
architecturalUse: Marks monitoring dials, pressure valves, water meters, or HVAC gauges.

name: Security Key
architecturalUse: Marks key-locked services, electric risers, control panels, or janitorial locks.
similarityWarning: Similar to Lock and Unlock symbols.

name: Construction Zone
architecturalUse: Marks hardhat zones, construction staging, manual labor workshops, or safety lockers.

name: Acoustic Source
architecturalUse: Marks noise sources, mechanical equipment, public address speakers, or zones of high acoustic emission.

name: High Noise Level
architecturalUse: Marks construction zones, alarms, engine rooms, or areas requiring hearing protection.

name: Quiet Zone
architecturalUse: Marks study areas, meditation rooms, library floors, or areas requiring low ambient noise.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing accessibility hearing (Ear) symbol.

name: Assistance Info Point
architecturalUse: Marks help desks, tourist info, guest relations, or accessibility support points.

name: Low Vision Access
architecturalUse: Marks tactile floor maps, braille signs, audio guide points, or visually accessible paths.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing annotation view (Eye) symbol.

name: Wellness / First Aid
architecturalUse: Marks wellness rooms, first-aid posts, prayer rooms, or care facilities.

name: Vehicular Road
architecturalUse: Indicates driving lanes, fire truck access roads, loading driveways, or public streets.

name: Bicycle Lane
architecturalUse: Marks bicycle parking racks, shower lockers, cycle lanes, or bike pathways.

name: Bus Stop / Station
architecturalUse: Marks public transit bus stops, shuttle docks, or bus stations on site layouts.

name: Railway / Transit Node
architecturalUse: Indicates railway alignments, subway station entries, metro links, or light rail stops.

name: Loading Dock / Truck
architecturalUse: Indicates back-of-house loading docks, delivery areas, freight elevators, or logistics ports.

name: Ferry / Boat Dock
architecturalUse: Marks public ferries, boat berths, marina docks, or canal transport stops.

name: Airport / Heliport
architecturalUse: Marks helipads, airport connections, or general aviation terminals in urban context.

name: Map Location
architecturalUse: Marks location of directory boards, map displays, or physical town planning landmarks.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing wayfinding signpost (Signpost) symbol.

name: Fixed Anchor
architecturalUse: Indicates pinned nodes, reference points, structural anchors, or unmovable constraints.

name: Relationship Link
architecturalUse: Marks close adjacency requirements, structural connections, or programmatic relationships.

name: Broken Relationship
architecturalUse: Indicates programmatic separation requirements, acoustic isolation zones, or avoid constraints.

name: Merge Flow
architecturalUse: Indicates convergence of foot traffic, water drainage channels, or mechanical ducts.
similarityWarning: Similar to split (Split) and branch (GitBranch) symbols.

name: Split Flow
architecturalUse: Indicates divergence of programmatic paths, pedestrian choice points, or duct distribution.
similarityWarning: Similar to merge (Merge) and branch (GitBranch) symbols.

name: Dispersion Flow
architecturalUse: Indicates random mixing zones, public squares with cross-circulation, or flexible layouts.

name: Union Combine
architecturalUse: Marks merged programmatic functions, shared zones, or unified site elements.

name: Hierarchy Tree
architecturalUse: Indicates zoning hierarchies, structural load-bearing paths, or departmental organization.

name: Zoning Grid
architecturalUse: Marks grid-based planning structures, structural bays, modular layouts, or zones.

name: Geometric Grid
architecturalUse: Marks module alignments, construction grid lines, or technical drawing references.

name: Alternate North Arrow
architecturalUse: An alternative North arrow design showing site bearing or solar orientation.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing annotation north (Navigation) symbol.

name: Milestone Flag
architecturalUse: Marks project checkpoints, property corners, site survey markers, or phase targets.

name: Metadata Tag
architecturalUse: Marks space category labels, occupant ID designations, or schedule keys in drawings.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing annotation area-tag (ScanText) symbol.

name: Drawing Pin
architecturalUse: Pins comments, annotations, visual references, or details to specific coordinates.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing wayfinding location (MapPin) symbol.

name: Saved Bookmark
architecturalUse: Marks key rooms for client presentations, highlights areas for review, or saves spaces.

name: Sticky Note
architecturalUse: Marks design feedback notes, coordinator comments, or client change requests on layout.

name: Sketch Pencil
architecturalUse: Indicates hand-drawn sketch overlays, coordinator markup, or designer changes.

name: Numbered Marker
architecturalUse: Marks door numbers, window schedule indexes, partition types, or item counts.

name: Footnote / Reference
architecturalUse: Links plan drawing coordinates to written specification notes or local guidelines.

name: Info Bullet
architecturalUse: Marks space specifications, occupancy rules, structural notes, or user guidance.
similarityWarning: Similar to existing accessibility help (CircleQuestionMark) and assistance-point (HelpCircle) symbols.

name: WC (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:toilet for architectural standardization.

name: Dining Room (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:dining.

name: Living Space (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:living.

name: Bed (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:bedroom.

name: Kitchen (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:kitchen.

name: Office (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:office.

name: Elevator (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:wayfinding:chevrons-up or custom elevator symbols.

name: Escalator (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:wayfinding:up-right or custom escalator symbols.

name: Car Parking (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:architecture:parking.

name: Pedestrian (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:wayfinding:walking.

name: Air Conditioning (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:environmental:cold.

name: Heating (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:environmental:heat.

name: WiFi Connectivity (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:service:connectivity.

name: Power Outlet (Alias)
architecturalUse: Alias pointing to icon:service:electrical.

name: Circulation Step Forward
architecturalUse: Intended for circulation segments but resembles standard player media controls too closely.
similarityWarning: Looks like software UI controls, not floor plan circulation.

name: Circulation Step Back
architecturalUse: Intended for reverse circulation segments but resembles standard player media controls too closely.
similarityWarning: Looks like software UI controls, not floor plan circulation.

name: Sunlight (Duplicate)
architecturalUse: Near duplicate of environmental:sun which uses SunMedium. Keep one canonical sun symbol.

name: Shared Connection
architecturalUse: Intended for joint links, but is too software-centric and easily confused with web application UI shares.
similarityWarning: Conflicts with application shell share icons.

name: Pizza Section (Duplicate)
architecturalUse: The slice icon (looks like a pizza slice) is highly non-standard for drafting sections. Needs custom drafting marker.

name: Elevator Lift Cab
architecturalUse: Indicates elevator shafts with cab outline in floor plan drawings. Lucide has no elevator cab symbol.
similarityWarning: Lucide has only Forklift or ChevronsUp. Custom path required.

name: Stairs Plan View
architecturalUse: Standard architectural symbol for stairs showing treads and exit direction arrow. Existing stairs (BetweenVerticalStart) is non-standard.
similarityWarning: Lucide lacks stairs plan symbol. Existing stairs symbol is a technical workaround.

name: Escalator Section
architecturalUse: Indicates escalator paths in shopping malls or transit hubs. Lucide lacks escalator symbols.
similarityWarning: Lucide has no escalator symbols. Custom path needed.

name: Wardrobe Plan Outline
architecturalUse: Architectural floor plan symbol for wardrobes: rectangle with clothes hanger or crossed dash lines.
similarityWarning: None. Lucide has only folder/archive drawers.

name: Plumbing: Sink Layout
architecturalUse: Plan view of single/double bowl sinks with tap indicators for kitchen counters or vanity units.
similarityWarning: Lucide has no sink/basin symbols. Custom path required.

name: Fence Gate Swing
architecturalUse: Standard plan symbol for double-swing vehicular gates or single pedestrian gates on boundaries.
similarityWarning: None. Lucide has no fence gate swing symbols.

name: Floor Drainage Drain
architecturalUse: Standard architectural symbol for floor waste drain (circle with center dot and radiating lines or grid).
similarityWarning: None. Lucide lacks floor drain symbols.

name: Architectural Section Cut
architecturalUse: Standard architectural drafting section cut symbol (circle head with orientation pointer and cut line). Existing slice is non-standard.
similarityWarning: Lucide has only pizza slice (Slice) or scissors, both inappropriate. Custom design required.
